Date:- {{ today_date }}

Bonafide Certificate

This is certified that Master/Miss {{ student.name }} is the student of our {{ school.school_name }}. He/She is studying in Std. {{ student.student_class }} for the academic year {{academic_year}}. Admission No. {{ student.admission_no }}. His/Her Birth date recorded in the General Register of the school is {{ student.dob|date:"d/m/Y" }} according to our school record.

Hence this is certificate.

Principal
